answer: The zip codes where both permits and code violations spike together this year are 78744, 78704, and 78745. In 78744, there were 3,697 permits and 1,781 code violations. In 78704, there were 3,547 permits and 1,701 code violations. In 78745, there were 3,127 permits and 1,741 code violations. These areas show the highest combined activity for both metrics.
